cards.txt: @george-station-cat.bsky.social bluesky Good morning & welcome to Roast Dinner Day Never regret having a kind heart. Kindness is never wasted. The good you give to the world has a way of finding its way back to you, often in ways greater than you ever imagined ♥ 857 💬 16
